Package index

All functions

add_choice()
Add a Choice to a Space-Separated Select Multiple String
apply_cleaning_log()
Apply a Validated Cleaning Log to the Raw Dataset
apply_other_responses()
Apply Other Responses Cleaning Log to a Dataset
apply_tool_labels()
Apply Tool Labels
check_constraints()
Check XLSForm Survey Constraints
combine_reviewed_logs()
Combine Reviewed Logs into a Single Reviewer-Ready Log
combine_sm_questions()
Combine multiple ONA select-multiple questions into a single consolidated column
create_cleaning_log()
Creates the final cleaning log workbook
create_combined_log()
Combine Validation Logs into a Single Cleaning Log
create_formated_wb()
Creates formatted workbook with openxlsx
evaluate_cleaning_log()
Evaluate a Filled Cleaning Log
export_final_output()
Export Final Data Cleaning Output Workbook
get_cols_numeric()
Get Numeric Column Names from XLSForm Survey
get_name_from_label()
Get Choice Name from Choice Label
get_other_db()
Get Other DB
get_other_labels()
Get Other Labels
load_packages()
Load Required Packages
prepare_other_responses()
Prepare Other Responses Dataframe
prioritize_enumerators()
Prioritise Most Suspicious Enumerators
read_cleaning_log()
Read and Prepare Filled Cleaning Log(s)
read_other_responses()
Read and Prepare Filled Other-Responses Files
read_raw_data()
Read Raw Main Dataset
read_tool_choices()
Read XLSForm Choices Sheet.
read_tool_survey()
Read XLSForm Survey Sheet.
remove_choice()
Remove a Choice from a Space-Separated Select Multiple String
rename_sm_choice_label()
Rename a Choice Label in a Select-Multiple Question
review_cleaned_data()
Review Cleaned Data Against the Raw Dataset and Cleaning Log
save_other_responses()
Save Other Responses
validate_back_to_back()
Validate Back-to-Back Interviews
validate_completeness()
Validate Dataset Completeness
validate_country_of_interview()
Validate Country of Interview
validate_duplicate_questions()
Validate Duplicate Answers for Specific Questions Per Enumerator
validate_duplicates()
Validate Survey Similarities (Soft Duplicates)
validate_duration()
Validate Survey Duration
validate_interview_time()
Validate Interview Time
validate_logical_with_list()
Validate Multiple Logical Checks from a Checklist
validate_refused()
Validate Refused Responses
